hookText: if you don't have a system for your relationships, you don't actually value them
mirrorText: harsh? maybe. but you set alarms for meetings and never once for the people you love.
enemyText: your calendar runs your work life. nothing runs your personal life. that's why people disappear.
mechanismText: EverReach is the system. warmth tracking. AI-suggested messages. one daily check-in. done.
